title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Maruti Suzuki India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Maruti Suzuki India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Maruti Suzuki India in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Maruti Suzuki India:
Maruti Suzuki India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maruti Suzuki India!
